name: Skill Library implementation map
description: Skill Library logic lives primarily in extensions/multi-agent/skill-discovery.ts, server endpoints in extensions/multi-agent/server.ts, Pi-facing skill tools in extensions/multi-agent/index.ts, and UI in web/app.tsx. Skill discovery delegates to Pi's DefaultResourceLoader, uses content-hash guards for edits, classifies project/global skills as editable, and supports directory skill trees plus safe text/markdown file preview/editing.

title: Skill library is constrained to discovered skills and editable roots
rationale: Dashboard/tool endpoints should not become arbitrary file read/write APIs. Skill reads resolve IDs only against discovered skills, file reads stay within a skill base directory, and writes require editable roots such as project .pi/skills or global Pi agent skills. Package skills remain preview/read-only by default.
